title: schoenus armeria var. globifer
intro: Schoenus armeria var. globifer, also known as globular Schoenus, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Schoenus armeria var. globifer include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
